## Schema: archive

### allitems {archive-allitems}

> Archived all items - historical complete item catalog

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| **Schema** | archive |
| **Rows** | 0 |
| **Created** | 2021-11-06 19:42:35.343000 |
| **Modified** | 2021-11-06 19:42:35.343000 |
| **Primary Key** | *None* |

#### Columns

| # | Column | Type | Nullable | Default | Key | Description |
|---|--------|------|----------|---------|-----|-------------|
| 1 | BidHeaderId | int | Yes |  |  | (Archived) Bid Header reference identifier |
| 2 | ItemId | int | Yes |  |  | (Archived) Foreign key to Items table |
| 3 | ItemCode | varchar(50) | Yes |  |  | (Archived) Short code or identifier |
| 4 | Description | varchar(2311) | Yes |  |  | (Archived) Text description of the record |
| 5 | UnitCode | varchar(20) | Yes |  |  | (Archived) Short code or identifier |
| 6 | VendorItemCode | varchar(50) | Yes |  |  | (Archived) Short code or identifier |
| 7 | Alternate | varchar(512) | Yes |  |  | (Archived) Alternate item description or substitution |
| 8 | BidPrice | money | Yes |  |  | (Archived) Price from winning bid |
| 9 | VendorId | int | Yes |  |  | (Archived) Foreign key to Vendors table |
| 10 | BidItemId | int | Yes |  |  | (Archived) Foreign key to Items table |
| 11 | CatalogId | int | Yes |  |  | (Archived) Foreign key to Catalog table |
| 12 | CrossRefId | int | Yes |  |  | (Archived) Foreign key to CrossRefs table |
| 13 | PricePlanId | int | Yes |  |  | (Archived) Foreign key to PricePlans table |

|----------|-------|

| **Modified** | 2018-01-21 20:26:47.137000 |

| # | Column | Type | Nullable | Description |
|---|--------|------|----------|-------------|
| 1 | CategoryName | varchar(50) | Yes | (View) Category name value |
| 2 | PricePlanName | varchar(278) | No | (View) Price Plan name value |
| 3 | BidHeaderId | int | Yes | (View) Foreign key to parent header record |

| 8 | Description | varchar(1024) | Yes | (View) (Archived) Text description of the record |
| 9 | UnitCode | varchar(20) | Yes | (View) Short code or identifier |
| 10 | VendorName | varchar(50) | No | (View) Display name |
| 11 | VendorCode | varchar(16) | No | (View) Short code or identifier |
| 12 | BidUnits | varchar(16) | Yes |  |
| 13 | BidRequest | int | Yes | (View) (Archived) Parent bid request ID |
| 14 | BidType | varchar(13) | Yes | (View) Type of bid/solicitation |
| 15 | QuantityBid | int | Yes | (View) (Archived) Quantity offered in the bid |
| 16 | UnitPrice | decimal(34,13) | Yes | (View) (Archived) Price per unit |
| 17 | ExtendedCost | decimal(38,6) | Yes | (View) Extended cost value |
| 18 | Alternate | varchar(MAX) | Yes | (View) Alternate item description or substitution |
| 19 | VendorItemCode | varchar(50) | Yes | (View) Short code or identifier |
| 20 | BidRequestStatus | varchar(50) | Yes | (View) Bid Request status value |
| 21 | Status | varchar(51) | Yes | (View) (Archived) Current status of the record |
| 22 | ResultsStatus | int | No | (View) Results status value |
| 23 | BidResultsId | int | Yes | (View) (Archived) Bid results unique identifier |
| 24 | Comments | varchar(1024) | Yes | (View) Vendor or buyer comments on bid |
| 25 | ItemComments | varchar(1024) | Yes |  |
| 26 | PriceVarianceLevel | decimal(9,5) | Yes | (View) Price Variance level value |
| 27 | FirstPrice | decimal(34,13) | Yes | (View) First price |
| 28 | FirstPriceBidResultsId | int | Yes | (View) First price bid results id |

| 33 | Variance | decimal(38,6) | Yes | (View) Variance from expected |

| 35 | PageNo | int | Yes | (View) (Archived) Page number in bid document |

| 37 | ItemsItemsPerUnit | varchar(50) | Yes |  |
